response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves the target stack (TypeScript, Node.js) plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Has relevant React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and testing experience, plus a CS degree. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure, but the foundation is solid enough to ramp up quickly.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP code generator experience at current role, matching a key requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Vitest not mentioned; testing experience appears centered on other frameworks
Kotlin experience absent and Java exposure is from older roles (robotic arms, 2016-2018)
